meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template for SaaS Success
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no SaaS knowledge' hurdle with the Antigravity project template. A high-level guide for freelancers to ship production-ready apps using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template abstracts complex SaaS architecture into a modular, production-ready foundation. By pairing it with Claude Code, you bypass manual boilerplate and infrastructure friction. This workflow allows you to ship professional-grade SaaS applications rapidly, effectively neutralizing technical knowledge gaps and enabling you to focus on high-value feature delivery.
content.intro:
The client is sitting across the table, expecting a world-class SaaS platform, but your terminal is empty and the blank-page syndrome is setting in. You have the design vision, but the deep-stack architectural knowledge required to wire auth, billing, and database schemas feels like an insurmountable wall between you and a high-ticket contract.

Stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity project template is the industry’s best-kept secret for high-velocity freelancers. It provides a hardened, opinionated foundation that handles the heavy lifting, allowing you to deploy secure, scalable SaaS applications in hours rather than weeks.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture to ensure your directory structure and core dependencies are production-ready immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template with integrated Auth, Stripe billing, and PostgreSQL/Prisma ORM.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate your business logic into database schemas without manual SQL configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with Users, Organizations, and SubscriptionPlans models using Prisma syntax.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Define the Prisma schema for multi-tenancy based on the requirements in schema-spec.md'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Generate type-safe API endpoints that adhere to your new schema, ensuring seamless frontend integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD API routes for the Organization model using the Antigravity API pattern with Zod validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate CRUD endpoints for Organizations with full Zod validation and error handling'

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Secure your application by mapping user roles to specific feature sets, preventing unauthorized access.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure RBAC middleware for the Antigravity template, restricting access to '/admin' routes to users with the 'OWNER' role.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement RBAC middleware in the auth-guard file for owner-only route protection'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Infrastructure
steps.description: Execute the final build and deployment sequence to push your finished application to a live staging environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the build configuration and generate the deployment script for Vercel/AWS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run build validation and output the deployment config for production environment'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review proposed file changes before committing them to your codebase.
Inject your own 'brand-specific' design tokens into the Antigravity theme file first to ensure every generated component matches your client's style guide.
Leverage the Antigravity 'internal-events' bus to decouple background jobs from your API response time, drastically improving perceived performance.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your common project-specific architectural constraints to avoid repeating them in every prompt.
Treat your generated code as a baseline; manually audit the security-critical auth hooks once before final delivery to ensure total compliance.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, perform a load test using the built-in Antigravity benchmarking suite and then invite your client to the staging URL for the first feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your project timeline. Master the Antigravity workflow today and reclaim your billable hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
